author: jenningsb2
description: Convert the selected Markdown to HTML and copy it to the clipboard.

manifest.author: Bailey Jennings
manifest.description: This is a simple plugin that converts the selected markdown to HTML and copies it to the clipboard.
manifest.name: Copy as HTML

name: Copy as HTML

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Fixing an issue with the bracket regex

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Adding support for a 'Remove comment' setting

If there is test that is %%commented out%%, it will be removed

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
1. The showdown library doesn't handle ==highlighted text== well, so I've elected to remove it.
2. I've also updated the system to remove block ids '^likeThis' from the output.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
(The last release has an error in the manifest.json) 

## New Features

**New Plugin Settings:** We've introduced a suite of new settings to give you more control over the markdown to HTML conversion process. You can now choose to remove wikilink brackets, remove emphasis text styling, and remove hashtags from your converted text. Here are the details of each new setting:

- **Remove Wikilink Brackets:** This new setting (enabled by default) allows you to remove the wikilink brackets ([[ and ]]) from the converted text. If you have a wikilink like [[text]], it will be converted to just text.

- **Remove Emphasis:** When enabled, this setting will remove all text styling from your converted markdown. This includes bold, italics, underlined text, and highlights.

- **Remove #Tags:** If you have text that is immediately preceded by a hashtag (e.g. #tag), enabling this setting will remove the hashtag and the following text from your converted HTML.

Please note that these settings are all optional and can be toggled on or off in the plugin settings panel.

- **Remove Emphasis:** When enabled, this setting will remove all text styling from your converted markdown. This includes bold, italics, underlined text, and highlights.

releases.author: jenningsb2
releases.description:
## Overview

It has been a while!

This update brings a few changes:

1. Upgrading the showdown dependency
2. Converts to the github flavor of markdown (adding support for tables, line breaks, etc)
3. Fixes the ellipsis issue mentioned

## What's Changed
* Use `github` flavor by @pdelre in https://github.com/jenningsb2/copy-as-html/pull/5

## New Contributors
* @pdelre made their first contribution in https://github.com/jenningsb2/copy-as-html/pull/5

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jenningsb2/copy-as-html/compare/1.0.5...1.0.6
